dashboard.description: Your AI-powered learning assistant for notes, quizzes, tests, and more.
dashboard.generateMaterials.title: Generate Study Materials
dashboard.generateMaterials.description: Let AI create comprehensive notes, quizzes, and flashcards for any topic.
dashboard.customTest.title: Create Custom Test
dashboard.customTest.description: Build a tailored test from topics, notes, or recent study sessions.
dashboard.dailyNews.title: Daily News Digest
dashboard.dailyNews.description: Catch up on the latest headlines from around the world, filtered your way.
dashboard.dailyMotivation.title: Daily Motivation
dashboard.dailyQuests.title: Daily Quests
dashboard.exploreFeatures.title: Explore All Features
dashboard.recentTopics.title: Recent Topics
dashboard.recentTopics.description: Quickly jump back into your recent study sessions.
dashboard.recentTopics.empty: No recent topics. Generate some study materials to see them here!
dashboard.totalLearnersGuestMessage: Sign up to see community stats!
generate.title: Generate Study Materials
generate.description: Enter any academic topic. LearnMint AI will generate notes, a 30-question quiz, and 20 flashcards, then take you to the Study Hub.
generate.toast.invalidTopicDesc: Topic must be at least 3 characters long.
audioFactory.title: Audio Factory
audioFactory.description: Generate spoken summaries from text, images, or documents, and create audio flashcards.
audioFactory.flashcards.title: Audio Flashcards Generator
audioFactory.flashcards.description: Create flashcards with male & female voice narration.
audioFactory.image.title: Image Audio Summarizer
audioFactory.image.description: Upload an image to get a spoken summary.
audioFactory.pdf.title: PDF Audio Summarizer
audioFactory.pdf.description: Upload a PDF to get a spoken summary of its content.
audioFactory.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Please upload an image under 2MB.
audioFactory.pdfTooLarge: PDF is too large. Please upload a file under 5MB.
audioFactory.pdfExtractError: Could not extract text from PDF.
customTest.pageDescription: Configure your test parameters. Generate questions from topics, notes, or recent studies.
customTest.topic.error.minLength: Topic(s) must be at least 3 characters.
customTest.notes.placeholder: Paste your study notes here (min 50 characters)...
customTest.notes.error.minLength: Notes must be at least 50 characters.
customTest.notes.attachFile: Attach Image, PDF, Audio, or Video
customTest.voice.error: Voice input error. Please try again.
customTest.recent.title: Select Recent Topic(s) (Max {{count}})
customTest.recent.empty: No recent topics found. Generate some notes first!
customTest.recent.error.noneSelected: Please select at least one recent topic.
customTest.recent.error.tooManySelected: You can select a maximum of {{count}} recent topics.
customTest.toast.topicsConfirmedDesc: Recent topics selection confirmed. Please proceed with other test settings.
customTest.toast.noTopicsSelectedDesc: Please select at least one recent topic to confirm.
customTest.settings.difficulty.label: Difficulty
customTest.settings.numQuestions.label: Number of Questions (1-50)
customTest.settings.timer.label: Overall Test Timer (minutes, 0 for none)
customTest.settings.perQuestionTimer.des: Per-question timer will auto-advance if time expires.
customTest.generate.error.noSource: Please provide a topic, notes, or select recent topics.
customTest.generate.toast.notesTruncated: Your notes were long and have been truncated to prevent errors.
customTest.generate.toast.successDesc: Your custom test is ready to start.
customTest.generate.toast.noQuestionsDes: The AI returned no questions for this configuration.
customTest.generate.speak.error: Sorry, there was an error generating the test.
customTest.test.title: Test: {{topics}} (Difficulty: {{difficulty}})
customTest.test.toast.timesUpDesc: Your test is being submitted automatically.
customTest.results.title: Test Results
customTest.results.error.title: Test Error
customTest.results.error.description: Something went wrong, or no questions were generated. Please try configuring a new test.
customTest.toast.retakeErrorDesc: Could not regenerate questions for retake.
customTest.file.pdf.processedDesc: Text from PDF has been added to the notes field.
customTest.file.pdf.errorDesc: Could not extract text from the PDF.
customTest.file.unsupportedDesc: Please upload an image, PDF, audio, or video file.
studyHub.title: Study Hub
studyHub.noTopic.title: No Topic Specified
studyHub.noTopic.description: Please generate study materials from the main "Generate" page first, or select a recent topic from the dashboard.
studyHub.notes.empty: Notes for this topic were generated successfully but appear to be empty.
studyHub.notes.unavailable: No notes available. Try refreshing or generating for a different topic.
studyHub.quiz.empty: Quiz was processed, but no questions were returned for this topic. Try refreshing or a different topic.
studyHub.quiz.unavailable: Quiz data could not be loaded. Please try refreshing.
studyHub.flashcards.empty: Flashcards were processed, but no cards were returned for this topic. Try refreshing or a different topic.
studyHub.flashcards.unavailable: Flashcard data could not be loaded. Please try refreshing.
studyHub.loading.title: Loading Study Hub...
studyHub.toast.noTopicErrorDesc: Cannot refresh without a valid topic.
notesView.title: Notes: {{topic}}
notesView.visualAid.title: Visual Aid Suggested
quizView.title: Quiz on: {{topic}}
quizView.results.title: Quiz Results
quizView.formatError.title: Question Format Error
quizView.formatError.description: This question is not in a recognizable format (e.g., multiple-choice with missing options, or an unknown type). Please check the AI generation source or skip this question.
quizView.speak.results: Quiz finished! Your final score is {{score}} out of {{totalPossibleScore}}.
flashcardsView.title: Flashcards for: {{topic}}
flashcardsView.unavailable: No flashcards available for this topic, or an error occurred.
flashcardsView.animation.label: Animation
guestLock.description: To access this feature and save your progress, please create a free account or sign in.
guestLock.features.arcadeDesc: Play fun, educational games to sharpen your mind and test your knowledge.
guestLock.features.chatbotDesc: Engage in dynamic conversations with personalized AI characters.
guestLock.features.customTestDesc: Build tailored tests with specific topics, difficulty, timers, and more.
guestLock.features.audioFactoryDesc: Unlock advanced features like multi-speaker audio discussions and spoken summaries.
auth.signOutDesc: You have been successfully signed out.
auth.guestWelcomeDesc: You can now explore all features.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.googleWelcomeDesc: You are now signed in with Google.
auth.accountExistsError: An account already exists with the same email address but different sign-in credentials.
auth.upgradeWelcomeDesc: Your account has been upgraded and saved.
auth.signUpWelcomeDesc: Your account has been created successfully.
auth.emailInUseError: This email is already associated with an account.
auth.credentialInUseError: This email is already linked to another account. Please use a different email.
profile.guestDescription: You are browsing as a guest. Sign up to save your progress!
profile.userDescription: Manage your account and track your daily progress.
profile.guestAddEmail: Sign up to add an email.
profile.guestUnlockDesc: Sign up to save your progress permanently.
